additional_patterns.name: humor_preference
evidence: "It is relaxing and yet motivates you to design your dream garden."
"I do not enjoy raw (insults, mocking and cursing) comedy."

summary: The user enjoys light-hearted romantic comedies and dramas with a strong emphasis on emotional resonance and visual appeal. They appreciate well-crafted stories that are simple yet engaging, and they have a preference for relaxing and pleasant viewing experiences.
